---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an addition to the brain architecture, training pipeline, tooling, or evaluation framework
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the gap in the current system.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed? Be as specific as you can about
the interface, the data flow, and how it integrates with the existing architecture.

## Scope

What is explicitly out of scope for this request? Bounded proposals are much
easier to evaluate.

## Verification

How would you verify that the feature works correctly? Such as: specific test
cases, benchmark metrics, or observable creature behaviour.

## Relevant context

Links to related issues, architectural review decisions, or sections of
`docs/overview/project-brief.md` that are relevant.

## Priority area

Does this touch one of the high-priority areas listed in CONTRIBUTING.md?
- [ ] CfC decision-lobe architecture
- [ ] Continuous-control RL
- [ ] Agent evaluation design
- [ ] C++ and pybind11 interface
- [ ] Other (describe below)
